Off Calendar Nov-23-2005 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mo And Mo To Strike Ans And Render Default Judgt For Failure To Comply With The Court'S Order Compelling Ans To Form Interrogs, Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Appearance For Desposition Testimony, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-10-2006 Off Calendar

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Dec-06-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents and to compel the appearance at deposition: is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection to form interrogatories and request for production of documents within 14 days of notice of this order. Defendant is also ordered to contact counsel for plaintiff to schedule his deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition is to be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $786.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2005 Set For Trial On May-15-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-26-06 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 303

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-21-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
